Crysknife  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 21
DMG: 4 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 4
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Average Price: 41pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 15
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Lake Rathetear
NPC Name
a gnoll embalmer

North Karana
NPC Name
Fixxin Followig

Qeynos Hills
NPC Name
Varsoon
Varsoon the Undying

South Karana
NPC Name
Ghanex Drah

Lake Rathetear
North Karana
Qeynos Hills

Post Comment
Dropped by Fixxin Followig and Varsoon
QuoteReply
# May 24 2021 at 3:27 AM Rating: Excellent
Nniki
Guru
297 posts
I had this drop from Fixxin Followig over the weekend and also from Varsoon (as other comments have mentioned) while sitting between runs of the Unity anniversary mission not long back. I'd actually be curious how much overlap there is between some of the loot tables here. I'm guessing a gnoll embalmer, Fixxin Followig, Varsoon, and Varsoon the Undying all have similar tables.

# Oct 12 2002 at 1:02 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592793169098
143 posts
Last night i killed a Varson the Unduying zomby in Qeynos hills - he dropped this knife
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 18 2002 at 5:29 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yeah, I just got if off Varsoon, after having killed him a number of times before without ever seeing one of these things. However, it dropped off Varsoon for me, not Varsoon the Undying (Varsoon the Undying tends to spawn after Varsoon's defeat, Undying is much strong, and they're both in Qynos Hills. Very rare spawns.)

# May 26 2001 at 4:36 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
The gnoll Enbalmer dropped it when I was in Lake rathetear

He casted like crazy and brought me down to 2 bubs of health with DoTs even though he conned green, it's not the worst weapon.

Hehe.. This thing is a POS.. I have gotten this like 3 out of the 9 times I killed ghanx D. He's in the undead camp right by the bridge to N.Kar. I have know idea if this drops in Paw or not, just know that this little lvl 15 gnoll drops it..

40th lvl Paladine <Shared Vision>

QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2001 at 2:28 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous

Anonymous
I was camping the GBS in Qeynos hills when varsoon appeared and attacked me i had to run but other ppl killed him and gave me the loot he carried a crysknife and a rusty dagger he is a lvl 27 to 29 (cons blue to 30 ench). also the lair of the split paw is not 15 it is 25 + atleast
▲ Page top
RE: for anyone who wants this not in SP
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 6:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248576252
Sage
178 posts
Ghanex Drah used to be inside of Split Paw. The dungeon was once a good dungeon for the teens. I'm sure that's where the original info about the item came from.

Split Paw Lair was revamped a while back, and is now a dungeon where mobs are in the 20s and 30s.

The crysknife is a common from gnoll embalmers in the gnoll camp in Lake Rathe as well.
▲ Page top
for anyone who wants this not in SP
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2001 at 2:25 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
▲ Page top
Then where is it?
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2001 at 4:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756816130
9 posts
Then where is it dropped?
▲ Page top
RE: Then where is it?
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 6:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248576252
Sage
178 posts
This item used to drop in Split Paw. It may still drop in SP if there are any gnoll necromancers in there. It currently drops off of Ghanex Drah in SK, and from gnoll embalmers in Lake Rathe.
▲ Page top
